name: ARGAN INC
summary: Argan, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated holding company operating primarily as an engineering and construction firm through three subsidiaries. Its Power segment provides full EPC services for power generation projects including natural gas, solar, wind, biomass, and biofuel facilities in the U.S., Ireland, and U.K. Its Industrial segment provides on-site construction and maintenance services in the U.S. Southeast. Its Teledata segment delivers power distribution and communications network services in the Mid-Atlantic U.S.

products.name: EPC Services
products.description: Full engineering, procurement, and construction services for power generation projects including combined-cycle, simple-cycle, solar, wind, biomass, and biofuel facilities.

products.name: Industrial Construction Services
products.description: On-site services for new plant construction, maintenance turnarounds, shutdowns, and emergency mobilizations including metal component fabrication and installation.

products.name: Teledata Infrastructure Services
products.description: Project management, construction, installation, maintenance, and emergency response for power distribution and communications/data networks.

products.name: Power Plant Maintenance and Commissioning
products.description: Turbine, boiler, and large rotating equipment engineering, procurement, installation, commissioning, and outage services.

products.name: Technical Consulting
products.description: Project development and technical consulting services to the power generation market.

partnerships.description: Collaboration with major gas-fired turbine manufacturers to deliver EPC projects using latest turbine technology per project owner requirements.
